title: Tremor Design System Samples
content: I built a design system for Tremor's digital products covering color, typography, font guidelines, layout variations, and elevation styles. Everything was documented in Figma so designers and developers were working from the same source. These are only a few samples of the whole project.

images.caption: Design System Overview: The full Tremor design system in Figma — modals, chips, tables, elevation, typography, colors, buttons, form elements, and navigation patterns, all in one organized file.
Color System: The support color palette — green, yellow, blue, red — plus a full grayscale range. Each swatch includes the name, hex code, and RGB value.
Typography Styles: Type styles for headings, subheadings, body text, quotes, and links, with documented variations in size, weight, decoration, and casing.

images.alt: Design System Font Family Guide Sample
images.caption: Font Family Guide: Open Sans and Open Sans Condensed — available weights and styles documented with numeric and alphabetic examples.
Typographic and Layout Variations: Layout explorations testing readability, alignment, and spacing — full-width and multi-column options across different content types.
Elevation Styles: Six elevation levels ($elevation-1 through $elevation-6), each showing the progressive shadow depth used across interactive and static components.
